creator: zirias@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #2)
As I said, I'd *really* prefer to have USE_GITLAB "fixed" accordingly first. The risk isn't just theoretic, it actually happened. Not to me, but really, better be safe, and have a *single* source of truth about the software's version in the port.

I'll have a look in the framework pretty soon myself (if nobody else already added tag support till then)!
